feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: The MIR Exoplanet CLimate Explorer MIRECLE, a Space Mission Dedicated to Exoplanet Transit and Phase Curve Spectroscopy
entry.content:
Authors: J Staguhn, A Mandell, D Fixsen, E Sharp, S Maher... - ... Society Meeting Abstracts, 2026

Abstract: ... Venus -like planet with a dense CO 2 atmosphere and a Mars -like planet with a thin CO 2 atmosphere. The strong ozone band at 9.7 μm allows for detecting the presence of molecular oxygen in the atmosphere, which is a powerful biosignature ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: (~biosignature|life|alien|organic) (Mars|Venus ... (keyword alert)

entry.title: Deciphering microbiota–host interactions through a multiomics approach: influence of prebiotics and Red Yeast Rice in a murine model of atherosclerosis

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: M Cicogni

Journal: 2026

Abstract: ... In this context, the present study aimed to investigate the impact of a prebiotic formulation, administered alone or in combination with red yeast rice (RYR) extract, one of the most used botanicals for AS patients, on atherosclerosis development in ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: A complete set of canonical nucleobases in the carbonaceous asteroid (162173) Ryugu

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: T Koga, Y Oba, Y Takano, H Naraoka, NO Ogawa... - Nature Astronomy, 2026

Abstract: Organic molecules delivered from extraterrestrial materials may have played a key role in supplying building blocks for life on Earth. Here we report all five canonical nucleobases—purines (adenine and guanine) and pyrimidines (cytosine, thymine ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: Life-like processes in synthetic protocells under external fields

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: V Willems, P Moreno, J Fojo, L Rodríguez-Arco... - Newton, 2026

Abstract: ... Synthetic protocells are self-assembled compartments designed to reproduce minimal features of prebiotic boundaries through bottom-up assembly. They offer a controlled platform to isolate universal physicochemical principles relevant to both ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: Unlocking the possible role of rhodochrosite for the geo-electrosynthesis of ammonia and urea in early ocean

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: X Ma, L Zhao, B Mao, J Bai, C Ren, W Zhang, C Hu - Nano Research, 2026

Abstract: ... urea on early Earth is crucial for the origins of life . Herein, we propose a prebiotic molecular synthesis process involving ammonia and urea ... This finding provides an abiotic pathway for the accumulation of key nitrogenous compounds under ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: A Formal Physical Framework for the Origin of Life : Dissipation-Driven Selection of Evolving Replicators

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: S Segal - arXiv preprint arXiv:2603.15230, 2026

Abstract: ... The emergence of life from inanimate matter presents a thermodynamic challenge: the Second Law of Thermodynamics dictates a global ... This paper presents a formal physical framework for abiogenesis grounded in the statistical physics of non-equilibrium ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

Alert: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ... (keyword alert)

entry.title: Self-oscillating coacervates: an internal chemical clock sustains membraneless protocell populations

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: H Sun, T Enomoto, T Yasuda, X Li, AM Akimoto...

Journal: 2026

Abstract: Living systems establish temporal order in molecular processes while operating far from thermodynamic equilibrium. This temporal control is implemented by internal clocks, which are biochemical networks that set the timing of biological processes 1-3 ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: Production of Xylooligosaccharides (XOSs) with Anti-inflammatory and Prebiotic Activities Using Recombinant Endo-1, 4-β-xylanases from Bacillus subtilis

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: NC Cuong, D Haltrich, A Boontawan, M Yamabhai - Journal of Agricultural and Food ..., 2026

Abstract: The enzymatic production of xylooligosaccharides (XOSs) from xylan-rich agricultural byproducts has gained attention as a sustainable and environmentally friendly approach. In this work, two forms of recombinant Bacillus subtilis xylanases ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: Revolutionizing Design: Optimizing HWO Architecture for Biosignature Detection from NUV to NIR Wavelengths
entry.content:
Authors: R Morgan, M Turmon, M Damiano, D Savransky... - ... Society Meeting Abstracts, 2026

Abstract: Abstract Habitable Worlds Observatory (HWO) aims to detect biosignatures from Earth-size exoplanets in the habitable zones of nearby stars. The wavelength range and spectra quality are critical drivers for HWO architecture designs and science ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Renyu Hu (author alert)

entry.title: Patterns of Language and Visuospatial Lateralisation in Three-Year-Old Children
entry.content:
Authors: JE Quin-Conroy, DM Bayliss, SJ Bovell, D Eamer... - Neuropsychologia, 2026

Abstract: Little is known about how or when language and visuospatial processing lateralise in the brain, and if individual differences in lateralisation are related to early language or visuospatial abilities. We explored if patterns of language and visuospatial ...

Tags: brain, Reviewer, too: Language, Numeracy, and Musicality

Alert: Simon E. Fisher (author alert)

entry.title: From Clouds to Chemistry: Harmonic Diagnostics of Substellar Atmospheric Variability
entry.content:
Authors: F Cocchini, M Plummer, P Kearns, A McCarthy... - ... Society Meeting Abstracts, 2026

Abstract: Young planetary-mass objects and brown dwarfs near the L/T spectral transition exhibit enhanced spectrophotometric variability over field brown dwarfs. Patchy clouds, auroral processes, stratospheric hot spots, and complex carbon chemistry ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets, Reviewer, too: Language, Numeracy, and Musicality

Alert: Björn Benneke (author alert)

entry.title: Confirmation of the hot super-Neptune TOI-672 b with NIRPS and HARPS and Insights into the Neptunian desert around M dwarfs
entry.content:
Authors: A Osborn, R Cloutier, V Bourrier, B Skinner, N Gromek... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: The Neptunian desert is a distinct lack of Neptune-sized planets at short orbital periods, purportedly carved by photoevaporation and tidal circularization following high-eccentricity migration. Constraining these processes and how they vary across ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets, Reviewer, too: Language, Numeracy, and Musicality

Alert: Björn Benneke (author alert)

entry.title: What You Prompt is What You Get: Increasing Transparency of Prompting Using Prompt Cards
entry.content:
Authors: AM Caut, B Zenebe, A Rouillard, DJT Sumpter - arXiv preprint arXiv:2603.12741, 2026

Abstract: The rapid advancement and impressive capabilities of large language models (LLMs) have given rise to the field of prompt engineering, the practice of crafting inputs to guide LLMs toward high-quality, task-relevant outputs. A critical challenge ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: David Sumpter (author alert)
